title: Anemoia
overview: Two friends walk while talking about a movie that they watched earlier, the protagonist says that the public dotes on romance that is why such films are made, his friend is uninterested and says that the film made him fall asleep all too well, he pulls out two cigarettes and smokes them, then he alludes to romance and asks the protagonist about something which the protagonist acts naive to, they eventually walk to a cafe, where they meet their dates for the day, all is going well, when the protagonist realizes something strange
